records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/ a little table, an irregular four-sided figure, dim. of <?/ a table, for <?/; <?/ (see Tetra-) + <?/ foot, akin to <?/ foot; hence, originally, a table with four feet. See Foot.]

defs: A plane figure bounded by four right lines, of which no two are parallel.
A bone of the carpus at the base of the first metacarpal, or thumb.
A region on the ventral side of the brain, either just back of the pons Varolii, or, as in man, covered by the posterior extension of its transverse fibers.
